metadata.description: Weapons classification taxonomy based on ARES (Arms & Munitions Classification System) and SAS (Weapons Identification Guide)

classifications.name: Self-Loading Pistol
classifications.description: A self-loading pistol with a rifled barrel that fires one round per trigger pull and automatically cycles the action.

images.caption: Self-Loading Pistol Examples
images.alt_text: Typical features of a modern self-loading pistol

classifications.name: Revolver
classifications.description: A handgun with a rifled barrel and a rotating cylinder that holds multiple cartridges.

classifications.name: Other Handguns
classifications.description: Smooth-bore handguns including shotgun pistols and other specialized types.

classifications.name: Sub-Machine Gun
classifications.description: A lightweight automatic or semi-automatic rifle firing pistol-caliber ammunition.

images.caption: Sub-Machine Gun Features
images.alt_text: Typical features of a modern sub-machine gun

classifications.name: Man-Portable Machine Gun
classifications.description: A machine gun that can be carried and operated by a single person, typically mounted on a bipod or tripod.

images.caption: Man-Portable Machine Gun Features
images.alt_text: Typical features of a modern man-portable machine gun

classifications.name: Automatic Rifle
classifications.description: A rifled long gun that fires automatically, cycling through multiple rounds with a single trigger pull.

images.caption: Automatic Rifle Features
images.alt_text: Typical features of a modern automatic rifle

classifications.name: Semi-Automatic Rifle
classifications.description: A rifled long gun that fires one round per trigger pull and automatically cycles the action.

images.caption: Semi-Automatic Rifle Features
images.alt_text: Typical features of a modern semi-automatic rifle

classifications.name: Break-Action Rifle
classifications.description: A rifled long gun where the barrel(s) pivot open for loading and unloading.

images.caption: Break-Action Rifle Features
images.alt_text: Typical features of a break-action rifle

classifications.name: Bolt-Action Rifle
classifications.description: A rifled long gun operated by manually pulling back and pushing forward a bolt handle to load rounds.

images.caption: Bolt-Action Rifle Features
images.alt_text: Typical features of a bolt-action rifle

classifications.name: Lever-Action Rifle
classifications.description: A rifled long gun operated by moving a lever (usually the trigger guard) forward and backward.

images.caption: Lever-Action Rifle Features
images.alt_text: Typical features of a lever-action rifle

classifications.name: Pump-Action Rifle
classifications.description: A rifled long gun operated by moving the foregrip forward and backward to cycle the action.

images.caption: Pump-Action Rifle Features
images.alt_text: Typical features of a pump-action rifle

classifications.name: Other Manually Operated Rifles
classifications.description: Manually operated rifled long guns with action types not covered by standard categories.

classifications.name: Automatic Shotgun
classifications.description: A smooth-bore long gun that fires automatically, cycling through multiple rounds with a single trigger pull.

images.caption: Shotgun Barrel Types
images.alt_text: Comparison of rifled and smooth-bore barrels

classifications.name: Semi-Automatic Shotgun
classifications.description: A smooth-bore long gun that fires one round per trigger pull and automatically cycles the action.

classifications.name: Break-Action Shotgun
classifications.description: A smooth-bore long gun where the barrel(s) pivot open for loading and unloading.

images.caption: Break-Action Shotgun Features
images.alt_text: Typical features of a break-action shotgun

classifications.name: Bolt-Action Shotgun
classifications.description: A smooth-bore long gun operated by manually pulling back and pushing forward a bolt handle.

images.caption: Shotgun Barrel Types
images.alt_text: Comparison of rifled and smooth-bore barrels

classifications.name: Lever-Action Shotgun
classifications.description: A smooth-bore long gun operated by moving a lever forward and backward.

images.caption: Shotgun Barrel Types
images.alt_text: Comparison of rifled and smooth-bore barrels

classifications.name: Pump-Action Shotgun
classifications.description: A smooth-bore long gun operated by moving the foregrip forward and backward to cycle the action.

images.caption: Pump-Action Shotgun Features
images.alt_text: Typical features of a pump-action shotgun

classifications.name: Other Manually Operated Shotguns
classifications.description: Manually operated smooth-bore long guns with action types not covered by standard categories.

images.caption: Shotgun Barrel Types
images.alt_text: Comparison of rifled and smooth-bore barrels

classifications.name: Other Smooth Bore Long Guns
classifications.description: Smooth-bore long guns not classified as shotguns or other standard types.
